## Entities.Journal.AnyProducedConfection type

Discriminated union of produced confection types. Discriminated on the `confectionType` field.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export type AnyProducedConfection = IProducedMoldedBonBon | IProducedBarTruffle | IProducedRolledTruffle;
```
